events.title: Modified Elementary Education / Kula Kalvi Controversy
events.description: C. Rajagopalachari administration. Major opposition mobilisation by the Dravidian movement
events.impact_summary: Track as a backlash policy. Its effect was not delivery success but political mobilisation against perceived hereditary/caste-linked schooling.
events.current_status: Closed policy; active as political memory and campaign reference
watchItems: Use only as historical lineage unless a party revives vocational-hereditary framing
Check education-policy speeches for Kula Kalvi comparisons
Separate archival fact from campaign insult

events.title: Kamaraj School Expansion and Midday Meal Lineage
events.description: K. Kamaraj administration. Expanded school access and enrolment drive
events.impact_summary: Measure enrolment, attendance, nutrition quality, school infrastructure, and daily meal delivery, not just political credit.
events.current_status: Legacy programme line with active daily delivery descendants

sourceLinks.label: Tamil Nadu Mid Day Meal portal

events.title: Language Policy Crisis and Congress Exit Lineage
events.description: M. Bhaktavatsalam administration. 1965 anti-Hindi agitation flashpoint
events.impact_summary: This is an event-policy bridge: it turned language administration into a durable electoral and federal-rights issue.
events.current_status: Historical crisis with continuing policy relevance

events.title: Tamil Nadu Identity, Two-Language Policy, and Self-Respect Marriage Law
events.description: C. N. Annadurai administration. Madras State renamed Tamil Nadu
events.impact_summary: Track as the baseline for identity policy, anti-Hindi politics, and secular marriage-recognition debates.

events.title: Social Justice, Housing, Markets, and 108 Ambulance Lineage
events.description: M. Karunanidhi administrations. Backward-class welfare and reservation expansion lines
events.impact_summary: Treat this as a multi-decade lineage. Every update needs a department, beneficiary group, budget, and present operational status.
events.current_status: Mixed legacy: some active, some renamed, some archival
watchItems: Reservation litigation and caste census data

events.title: Caretaker Continuity During Leadership Transitions
events.description: V. R. Nedunchezhiyan acting administrations. Cabinet continuity
events.impact_summary: Use this record to prevent fake scheme attribution to caretaker windows. The intelligence value is continuity and succession, not welfare launch claims.

events.title: Nutritious Noon Meal Programme
events.description: M. G. Ramachandran administration. Expanded school meal coverage as mass welfare
events.impact_summary: The policy impact is school retention plus nutrition, but the risk is delivery quality, menu politics, and supply-contract leakage.
events.current_status: Active legacy line through noon-meal and breakfast schemes

sourceLinks.label: Tamil Nadu Mid Day Meal portal

events.title: Janaki Ramachandran Short-Term Transition Government
events.description: V. N. Janaki Ramachandran administration. AIADMK succession struggle
events.impact_summary: A short-tenure control record to stop false policy inflation. Treat updates as succession events unless backed by a G.O.

events.title: Jayalalithaa Welfare Brand and Administrative Mandates
events.description: J. Jayalalithaa administrations. Cradle Baby Scheme and women-focused policing initiatives
events.impact_summary: Separate brand survival from service survival. Canteens, water, pharmacies, and benefit schemes need operating counts, payment status, and beneficiary access checks.
events.current_status: Several active or partially active; requires outlet-level and department-level monitoring

events.title: OPS Interim Continuity and Crisis Administration
events.description: O. Panneerselvam interim administrations. Budget continuity
events.impact_summary: Track interim administrations by file movement, emergency response, and scheme continuity instead of pretending every term launched flagship schemes.
